WT: 5.5 Size: MEDIUM

Slot 2, Type 21 (Special Ornamentation)

Confirmed last night this still drops in Old Sebilis off Sebilite Golems. I looted it off a golem in the disco area (2 spawns points that face each other just after the door).

Guild hall tribute offers 1034 points for this.

Guild hall vendor offers 142p.

# May 31 2002 at 1:12 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592253751719
87 posts
Got this for my shammy alt last night from another shammy, who'd retired hers. Bought for 2.5k. She said they are going for 3k, and had 4-5 tells after I agreed to buy it. Also got a spine chill spear from her for a good deal, too. The outrageous prices at the bottom are old.
▲ Page top
good deal
QuoteReply
# May 05 2002 at 1:20 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591778324708
20 posts
I sought this thing out after hearing about it. Before I had gotten this I had a dusty breastplate which is around the same ac , maybe a little higher, but no added wisdom. The added wis and ac to this makes it a great piece for me as a halfling cleric. Bought it on the zeb server, see em go for about 2.5-3k, got mine for a mere 2334pp, hehe, worth all the saving.

I just bought this on The Nameless for 2000pp. It replaced a Totemic BP that I have used since lev 25. My new BP has nice AC and every bit of wisdom I get that I didn't have before really helps. I will most likely hang on to this until I can get a Jaundiced BP, Plane Armor or Epic.

14 posts
Anyone notice that this is a Froglok SCALE Chestplate when frogs don't have scales? Heheh.
▲ Page top
RE: Scaly frogs
QuoteReply
# Dec 17 2002 at 6:50 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1609114741104
View User Forum
13 posts
Scale is a form of armor. Leather, Ring Mail, Scale Mail, Chain Mail, Plate Mail. Ring Mail is leather with multitudes of large metallic rings all over it, scale mail is based on a leather back ground and has little metal scales sewn in overlapping configurations, like shingles on a house. Chain Mail is interwoven links of metal forming a patern not too unlike a knit sweater. And finally plate mail is large metal plates attacked to a leather padded backing that are strapped in strategic locations all over the body.

▲ Page top
Got me one :)
